meta.title: EREBUS
meta.note: The world is data. Each room here is rendered by script.js. Add a room, commit, and the world grows. Colors are hex. 'stops' are places the camera pauses (each gets a text panel). 'structures' are what floats in that room's stretch of space.

stops.title: JC — designer & developer building digital dream spaces.
stops.body: This world grows new rooms over time. Scroll to drift through what exists so far.

stops.title: Project One
stops.body: A placeholder shard. Real selected work docks here when it's ready for show.

stops.title: Project Two
stops.body: Another shard holding orbit. The work exists — it's being finished properly.

stops.title: Project Three
stops.body: Reserved. Every empty shard is a promise, not an apology.

stops.title: The Bloom
stops.body: A garden that grows without light. Ideas seed here before they become rooms — some of them glow, some of them wait.

stops.title: Something is growing
stops.body: This chamber rearranges itself as the world learns. What you see today is not what you'll find next month. Look closely — not everything here is asleep.

secret.title: You looked closer.
secret.body: This is the first hidden thing in EREBUS. There will be others, buried deeper, as the agents keep building rooms. Screenshot this — you were here before the world grew.

stops.title: The Relics
stops.body: Monuments to things not built yet. This hall becomes the marketplace — rooms you can buy inside, products floating where paintings would hang.

stops.title: Future artifacts
stops.body: Print-on-demand lines, collaborations, limited pieces — each will get its own monolith in this hall. Checkout happens without leaving the dark.

stops.title: Let's build yours.
stops.body: Branding, websites, products, worlds. Say hello and tell me what you're making.
